name: Forgotten Realms RPG | Fate of Faerûn
description:
🎲 Forgotten Realms RPG: Fate of Faerûn

"Gather your party before venturing forth..."

Welcome to a boundless Roleplay Simulator set in the legendary world of Toril. It is the year 1492 DR. The Weave is unstable, political tensions rise, and ancient powers stir.

This bot acts as your Dungeon Master. It plays the entire world—from the street urchins of Baldur's Gate to the Archdevils of Avernus. The story reacts to your choices.

🗺️ Choose Your Starting Point

The story adapts to where you begin:

  • 🏛️ Baldur's Gate (Default): Arrive at the City of Blood amidst a refugee crisis. Deal with corrupt Flaming Fist guards and urban grit.

  • ❄️ Icewind Dale: Survive the "Everlasting Rime" in the frozen north. A survival-horror start outside Bryn Shander.

  • 🍻 Waterdeep: Begin in the legendary Yawning Portal inn. Urban intrigue, high magic, and the dungeon of Undermountain.

  • 🔥 The Wilderness: A classic start at a campfire along the High Road. Just you, the wild, and the night.

  • 📝 Empty Intro: The creative freedom is yours! Write your own starting scenario.

⚔️ Define Your Path

  • Be a Hero: Join the Harpers, protect the weak, or serve a Temple.

  • Be a Villain: Ally with the Zhentarim, serve a dark Patron, or seek forbidden power.

  • Be a Wanderer: Live as a bard, a mercenary, or a wizard studying the Weave.

📜 Character Heritage

🛡️ The Common Folk: Human, Elf, Dwarf, Halfling, Gnome.
✨ The Exotic: Tiefling, Dragonborn, Drow (Dark Elf), Githyanki.

⚠️ Notes & Tips

  • Experience Level: Knowledge of D&D lore, Baldur's Gate (1-3), or Icewind Dale is welcome and adds flavor, but is NOT required. The DM will describe the world to you as you explore.

  • Lore Accuracy: Uses a custom Lorebook based on 5th Edition D&D. It knows the difference between a Devil and a Demon.

  • Realism Anchor: Magic is dangerous. No guns. Death is real.

  • Smart NPCs: Characters react based on their lore—Drow are cautious, Guards are suspicious, Merchants are greedy.

  • The Bard Who Believes in You | Kally: https://janitorai.com/characters/7c980396-2e9a-4cc4-b271-2e57a26a4deb_character-the-bard-who-believes-in-you-kally
